description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult pedestrian, depicted with a slender build and standing posture. The figure is dressed in a sleeveless, fitted top and straight-cut pants, with visible seams and button details on the top. The individual has shoulder-length, straight hair that is neatly parted in the middle. The arms are unusually elongated and raised, extending sharply upward and outward, creating a striking and unnatural pose. The footwear appears to be simple, closed-toe shoes, and the overall appearance suggests casual, everyday attire suitable for an urban environment.
description: An adult pedestrian with a slender build, casual sleeveless top, straight pants, and shoulder-length hair, standing with arms dramatically extended upward and outward.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, sleeveless top with button details, and both arms raised and extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the fitted top, and the extreme upward extension of the left arm.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the back of the top and pants, and both arms crossing behind the figure.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, the fitted top, and the right arm's upward extension.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless fitted top and straight-cut pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms raised and extended outward
attribute_hairstyle: shoulder-length straight hair parted in the middle
